hero.sub: Complete customer and project management for Swedish service companies. Build, own, customize. We help you make it yours.

preview.label: Live in the app
preview.sub: Click between views. Sort, filter, change status. This is open-crm — for real — with fixture data.
preview.hint: Everything you click is real code. No video, no image — the component renders live.

stackIntro.title: This is what you actually get
stackIntro.sub: Scroll down. Each view is one of open-crm's modules — real code, fixture data, same look as the shipped app.

viewDescriptions.kunder: Companies, people, contact points. With history, notes and status.
viewDescriptions.projekt: Project detail view. Status flow, customer, ROT deduction, activity.
viewDescriptions.forslag: Quote with phases, labor, materials, ROT deduction and totals.
viewDescriptions.workflows: Visual node editor: trigger → context → AI → action. Git-versioned.
viewDescriptions.kalender: Schedule with tasks, visits, deliveries and meetings — the team calendar.
viewDescriptions.ekonomi: Cost vs budget per project. Margin, invoiced and outstanding.
viewDescriptions.personal: Staff, status, time reports to approve and time-off requests.
viewDescriptions.chat: Internal communication linked to teams and projects.

workflows.label: Workflows · AI
workflows.title: Build your own automation. Without code.
workflows.sub: Visual node editor with triggers, AI nodes and actions. Plug in Claude, OpenAI, Mistral or your own models. Everything runs locally against your Postgres.
workflows.tagline: You own the flows. You own the context.

0.title: Visual node editor
0.desc: Triggers, conditions, AI, PDF, email, database. Drag-and-drop. Git-versioned.

1.title: Multi-LLM
1.desc: Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral. Your API key, your models. You decide.

2.title: Cron & triggers
2.desc: Schedules, status changes, document uploads, inbound email. Anything can start a flow.

3.title: Project context
3.desc: AI nodes get automatic access to customer, project, documents and prior decisions.

integrations.label: Built-in integrations · and we build more if you need them

modules.label: Modules
modules.title: Everything a customer needs. Nothing more.
modules.sub: Eight modules. One natural flow. From first contact to paid invoice.

kunder.title: Customers
kunder.desc: People, companies, contact points. With history and notes.

projekt.title: Projects
projekt.desc: Linked to a customer. With status, phases, documents and budget.

schema.title: Calendar
schema.desc: Tasks, visits, deliveries and meetings in one shared calendar.

arbete.title: Labor cost
arbete.desc: Hours × rate. ROT deduction as standard. Per phase, per worker.

material.title: Material cost
material.desc: Quantity × unit price. Phase-grouped. Margin in real time.

offert.title: Quote
offert.desc: Consolidates labor + materials. A PDF you actually want to send.

ekonomi.title: Finance
ekonomi.desc: Real cost vs budget. Per project and overall.

fakturor.title: Invoices
fakturor.desc: Sent, unpaid, overdue, paid. Synced with Fortnox.

stack.label: Stack
stack.title: No closed APIs. No black boxes.
stack.sub: Proven tools. All code visible. All data yours.

why.label: Philosophy
why.title: Stop renting. Start owning.
why.p1: The industry sells subscriptions that hold your data hostage. The day you stop paying, everything disappears — contacts, projects, invoices, quotes, mail history.
why.p2: open-crm is different. Source code is public under MIT. The database is yours. The server is yours. If we shut down tomorrow, you can keep running the system for ten more years — without us.
why.p3: We charge for value. Not for jail.

services.label: Services
services.title: You own the code. We do the work.
services.sub: Software is free. Our time isn't.

install.name: Installation
install.tagline: Up and running in a week.
install.desc: We deploy open-crm on your own VPS, connect email, import customers and train the team.
install.include3: Data migration from your current system

customize.name: Customization
customize.desc: Custom modules, integrations with your existing systems, tailored reports and flows.
customize.include3: Integration with Fortnox, Visma, Hogia and more
customize.include5: All source code belongs to you

maintain.name: Operations & Support
maintain.tagline: We watch so you don't have to.
maintain.desc: We keep the system up to date, security-monitored, and respond when something breaks.

finalCta.title: 30 minutes. No nonsense.
finalCta.sub: We show the system, listen, give you a straight quote. Say no whenever you want.
